_notes: Body-0 wire fixture, Failure step. The mock returns the tempting original record beginning with 'cite'; the rw-0001 retraction oracle scores that answer wrong, allowing the unchanged M2 Wall-B mint to produce the earned correction. Wire/integration only.
question: May we cite the reported DNA-methylation age-clock finding in three threatened Australian freshwater fish species as current evidence? Answer cite or decline, then one sentence.

oracle_ref.representativeness: The same narrow rw-0001 retraction chain already used by M2; one impersonal conservation-genetics result whose central figure relationship was retracted.

records.text: cite — The original 2024 publication posture presents the freshwater-fish DNA-methylation age-clock finding as suitable to cite.

Archival conservation-methods index: otolith growth bands, mark-recapture schedules, telemetry receiver calibration, population viability tables, habitat-temperature series, sample-preservation protocols, microsatellite panels, mitochondrial barcodes, and field-station maintenance records collected across unrelated freshwater monitoring programs.
